body: Just saw Radiohead's new tour. OK Computer played front to back. Absolutely mind-blowing.
So jealous! OK Computer is a masterpiece. How was the sound quality at the venue?
Incredible. The visuals during Paranoid Android were insane. Thom Yorke's voice hasn't aged at all.
I prefer Kid A and Amnesiac era personally. Everything In Its Right Place live must be transcendent.
They played that as an encore! The whole crowd was singing along. Best concert I've been to in years.
